faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1_answer: KLARQ is led by Kimberley Díaz and Lluís Oliva, architect and president of the Ibiza and Formentera chapter of the COAIB (Official Association of Architects of the Balearic Islands).
faq.q2_answer: We work mainly in Ibiza and Mallorca, although we have also completed projects outside the islands, such as in Tres Cantos (Madrid) and Benasque.
faq.q3_question: How long does a project with KLARQ take?
faq.q3_answer: It depends on the size and scope: a renovation usually takes 6 to 12 months, and new-build construction between 18 and 24 months.
faq.q4_question: What does the design process look like?
faq.q4_answer: We always start with a meeting to understand the client's needs and goals. Once the project begins, we work with moodboards to confirm we're on the right track before developing the full project.
faq.q5_question: Do you work with international clients?
faq.q5_answer: Yes, a large part of our clients are European buyers looking for a second home in Ibiza or Mallorca.
faq.q6_question: How much does a project with KLARQ cost?
faq.q6_answer: Every project is different and designed to measure, so we don't work with fixed prices. Get in touch and we'll give you guidance based on your project's specifics.
faq.q7_question: What is Passivhaus and why do you apply it?
faq.q7_answer: Passivhaus is an international energy-efficiency standard that drastically reduces a home's heating and cooling demand through continuous insulation, elimination of thermal bridges, and heat-recovery ventilation. At Ca Na Lola we achieved 0.38 ACH airtightness; at Son Maig we applied the Passivhaus Plus standard.
faq.q8_question: Do you only do architecture, or interior design too?
faq.q8_answer: KLARQ brings together three areas under one team: KLARQ architecture (new builds, renovations and refurbishments), KLARQ decor (interior design, kitchens and furniture) and KLARQ development (real estate developments).
faq.q9_question: How do I start a project with you?
faq.q9_answer: Email us at info@klarq.eu or call +34 656 362 863. We'll set up an initial meeting to learn about your project and define next steps.
